name: continuous-improvement
description: Expert mode: tune confidence, manage instincts, and persist plans on disk. Adds safety, token-budget, and strategic-compact skills plus the /learn-eval command so long sessions stay sharp and learnings survive context resets.

tools.name: ci_status
tools.what: See what the system has learned about your project

tools.name: ci_instincts
tools.what: List all learned behaviors with confidence levels

tools.name: ci_reflect
tools.what: Reflect on what you did this session

tools.name: ci_gateguard_clear
tools.what: Clear the GateGuard gate for files after presenting facts

tools.name: ci_reinforce
tools.what: Accept or reject instinct suggestions to tune confidence

tools.name: ci_create_instinct
tools.what: Manually create instincts with custom triggers and confidence

tools.name: ci_observations
tools.what: View raw tool call observations captured by hooks

tools.name: ci_export
tools.what: Export instincts as JSON for sharing or backup

tools.name: ci_plan_init
tools.what: Create project-root planning files for persistent task memory

tools.name: ci_plan_status
tools.what: Summarize task_plan.md, findings.md, and progress.md status

tools.name: ci_dashboard
tools.what: Visual dashboard showing instinct health, confidence distribution, and learning progress

tools.name: ci_load_pack
tools.what: Load starter instinct packs (react, python, go) into the current project

tools.name: ci_goal_check
tools.what: Detect when a session has drifted from its stated goal

tools.name: ci_recall
tools.what: Search past sessions for relevant prior activity (episodic recall)

tools.name: ci_distill_candidates
tools.what: Find repeated successful tool sequences worth turning into skills

tools.name: ci_distill_propose
tools.what: Draft a reusable instinct from a repeated successful pattern

tools.name: ci_distill_promote
tools.what: Promote an edited draft into a live instinct

tools.name: ci_distill_from_workflow
tools.what: Draft a reusable instinct from a verified Workflow run

hooks.description: Full hook suite: observation capture, lazy prompt routing, session-level instinct loading, and auto-reflection.
